uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01): 28.0 C, 60.0 %, battery 2.8 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; humidity byte 10 = 120 -> 60.0 % (0.5 %/count). expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temp 28, Humi 60, Volt 2.8) and mapping to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01): negative temperature -0.2 C, 50.0 %
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising two's-complement temperature: bytes 8-9 = 0xFFEC -> -20 counts -> -0.20 C. Oracle (reference/upstream-codec.js) returns Temp -0.2, Humi 50.

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report (report type 0x01) with low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; byte 3 = 0x9C sets the low-battery high bit over 0x1C (2.8 V). Oracle reports Volt '2.8(low battery)'; mapped to battery 2.8 + lowBattery extra.

uplink.description: Combined temperature/humidity/illuminance report (report type 0x12) with alarm flags
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; bytes 4-5 = 0x0B00 -> 28.16 C, bytes 6-7 = 0x1388 -> 50.00 % (0.01 %/count), byte 10 = 0x2A -> high temp/humidity/illuminance alarms set. Oracle (reference/upstream-codec.js) Temp 28.16, Humidity 50%, alarm bits {0,1,0,1,0,1}. The R31504 has no light sensor, so the illuminance field is intentionally not emitted.

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report flagged invalid carries no measurement (report type 0x01, byte 5 bit0 clear)
uplink._note: Synthetic input; byte 5 = 0x08 clears the T/H validity bit. Oracle returns sentinel Temp '0xFFFF' / Humi '0xFF'; our codec reports no measurement.

uplink.description: Device info / version frame carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (TTN startup version report). Oracle decodes Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode (no measurement).

uplink.description: Illuminance-only report carries no climate measurement (report type 0x02)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. Oracle decodes Illuminance + alarm flags only; the R31504 has no light sensor, so this report holds no climate measurement.

uplink.description: Function-enable / binary-sensor-state snapshot carries no measurement (report type 0x11)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. Oracle decodes only sensor-enable/state bitmaps (no measurement).

uplink.description: Configuration command response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input (ConfigReportRsp). fPort 7 carries config responses, not measurements.
Synthetic input on an unused fPort; upstream returns 'unknown FPort'. Data reports are only on fPort 6.
